violations.description: General food protection. — --Potentially hazardous food was not stored at proper temperature of 41 F or below.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Cases of food was stored on the floor in the dry storage area.
Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Observed frozen meat chubs stored in the sink not under running water.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floors under the fryers is due for deep cleaning.
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
